abilities.name: Flight
abilities.text: This model ignores terrain and other models while moving.

abilities.name: Pyromania
abilities.text: After this model receives a raise, give a Burning token to a model within 6".

abilities.name: Reckless
abilities.text: Once per activation. When this model declares an action, it may deal 1 irreducible damage to itself to treat that action as a (+) action.

actions.name: Conflagration
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action receives a (+) if the target has a Burning token.
actions.effects: Models damaged by this action gain a Burning token.

triggers.name: Kindle
triggers.text: Target must have a Burning token. Deal 1 damage to the target.

triggers.name: Twirl the Gas Can
triggers.text: This trigger must be declared, if able. When resolving, this action deals +1 damage to the target. Then, deal 1 damage to another friendly model within range.

actions.name: Light Under Their Feet
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action may target friendly models.
actions.effects: Move the target up to its Sp. This model may remove a Burning token from the target to have it ignore models and terrain while moving.

actions.name: Blast to Bits
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per activation. Target a Scheme marker.
actions.effects: Models within (r)2" of the target must pass a TN 12 Sp duel or be dealt 2 damage. Then, remove the target.

triggers.name: Blaze
triggers.text: Models damaged by this action gain a Burning token.

triggers.name: Arcanist Cache
triggers.text: Summon a Steam Arachnid within 1" of the target.
